items.name: Cesar Oviedo
items.content: A well-rounded profile balancing technical and aesthetic excellence with an impeccable work ethic and strong team cohesion.

items.name: Gilberto Martínez
items.content: Demonstrated strong adaptability and quick learning of new technologies. Notable for initiative, proposing improvements and applying solid development best practices.

items.name: Daniel Rodríguez
items.content: Technically strong in UI/UX, good programming logic, efficient resource management and solid database understanding. Soft skills include people management, leadership, effective communication and team coordination.

items.name: Oscar Zavala
items.content: Excellent, very clean and organized. Has an excellent way of handling code.

items.name: Anahí Solís
items.content: I believe Joaht Vera did a good job as a developer, showing responsibility, initiative and strong technical skills.
